title: omphalandria frondosa
intro: Omphalandria frondosa, also known as the lesser bladderwort, is a carnivorous plant belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Omphalandria frondosa are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a medicinal tea, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
